common.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters

dataTable.selectAll: Select all rows on this page
dataTable.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# row selected} other {# rows selected}}

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.description: Search for a command, page, or project.

activeTasks.trigger: {count, plural, one {# running task} other {# running tasks}}
activeTasks.title: Running tasks
activeTasks.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# task currently running} other {# tasks currently running}}

projectsEmpty.title: No projects yet
projectsEmpty.description: Create your first project to start managing backups and deployments.

home.title: Projects
home.subtitle: Pick a project to manage backups, restores, and history.

recentActivity.title: Recent activity
recentActivity.empty: No activity yet. Run a backup, restore, or time mocking to see it here.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: View status and start, stop, or restart services for {name}.
services.infoNote: Status is checked over SSH. Start, stop, and restart run in the background — progress streams in the card.
services.confirmDescription: {action} {target} service ({serviceName})? This will affect everything depending on it.

backupDb.title: Backup database
backupDb.subtitle: Create a new backup snapshot of {dbName}.
backupDb.targetDescription: The database below will be dumped and stored on the configured backup path.
backupDb.infoNote: Backups run in the background — progress streams below. You can also review past runs in History.
backupDb.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to create a backup for database {dbName}?
backupDb.successDescription: A backup for database {dbName} has been queued.
backupDb.compressHint: Recommended — produces a smaller file (gzip for Postgres, internal compression for MSSQL).

restoreDb.title: Restore database
restoreDb.subtitle: Restore {dbName} from a previous backup snapshot.
restoreDb.pickerDescription: Pick the snapshot you want to restore from.
restoreDb.backupsNotFoundDescription: There are no backup files at the configured path yet.
restoreDb.dangerNote: Restoring will overwrite the current database state. This cannot be undone.
restoreDb.restartBackendHint: Restarts {backendName} so it drops stale DB connections and clears in-memory caches.
restoreDb.confirmDescription: Restore {dbName} from {filename}? This will overwrite the current database.
restoreDb.successDescription: A restore for database {dbName} has been queued.

mockTime.title: Mock time
mockTime.subtitle: Override the clock used by {name} for testing.
mockTime.formDescription: Pick the date and time the project should think it is.
mockTime.modeApiHint: Will talk to the clock API at {url}.
mockTime.modeLegacyHint: Will change the backend server clock and restart {name}.
mockTime.confirmDescriptionLegacy: Change the backend server clock to {dateTime} and restart the backend service? This affects everything running on that server.
mockTime.successDescriptionLegacy: Server clock change to {dateTime} has been queued.
mockTime.legacyWarning: This project has no time-mocking API configured, so the legacy approach will change the server clock and restart the backend. Anything else running on that server will also see the new time.

clockState.title: Clock state
clockState.description: Current state of the backend clock.

travel.title: Travel
travel.description: Jump to the selected date and time. The clock keeps running from there.
travel.confirm: Travel to {dateTime}? The clock will resume running from there.
travel.confirmLegacy: Change the backend server clock to {dateTime} and restart the backend service? Anything else running on that server will also see the new time.
travel.queuedDescriptionLegacy: Server clock change to {dateTime} has been queued.

freeze.title: Freeze
freeze.description: Stop the clock. Pick a target to freeze it at, or freeze it where it is now.
freeze.confirmNow: Freeze the clock at its current time?
freeze.successDescriptionNow: Clock frozen at its current time.

advance.title: Advance
advance.description: Shift the frozen clock forward (or backward with a negative duration). Only available while frozen.
advance.descriptionLegacy: Shift the backend server clock forward (or backward) relative to its current time. Restarts the backend.
advance.confirmLegacy: Advance the backend server clock by {duration} and restart the backend service? Anything else running on that server will also see the new time.
advance.notFrozen: The clock must be frozen first before you can advance it.

reset.title: Reset
reset.description: Drop the mock and unfreeze. The clock will return to real wall-clock time.
reset.descriptionLegacy: Re-enable NTP on the backend server, force an immediate clock sync, and restart the backend service.
reset.confirm: Reset the clock back to real time? This clears any mock and unfreezes.
reset.confirmLegacy: Re-enable NTP on the backend server, force a clock sync, and restart the backend service?
reset.successDescription: Clock is back to real time.

docs.title: Time Mocking API
docs.description: REST API reference for controlling system time in testing environments.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Recent backup, restore, and time mocking operations for this project.
history.emptyDescription: Backup, restore, and time mocking activity will appear here after the first run.

liveTask.connectionError: Lost connection. Reload the page to resume streaming.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Speed up your workflow with these shortcuts.

newProject.title: Create new project
newProject.description: Register a new project along with its database, backend, and frontend server configuration.
newProject.formDescription: Pick a server for each role (database, backend, frontend) and provide service details.

projectForm.name: Project name
projectForm.pickServerRequired: Pick a server for every role (database, backend, frontend)
projectForm.dbPasswordHint: Required for Microsoft SQL Server (used by sqlcmd). Leave blank for PostgreSQL.
projectForm.dbPasswordRequiredForMssql: Database password is required for Microsoft SQL Server
projectForm.backupPathHint: Path inside the database container where backup files are written. Configure your bind mount separately in docker-compose if you also need host-side access.
projectForm.mockTimeApiUrlHint: If the backend exposes a time-mocking endpoint, paste it here. When empty, the panel will fall back to changing the server clock + restarting the backend.
projectForm.mockTimeApiKeyHint: Sent as the X-Api-Key header when calling the time-mocking endpoint. Leave blank if the endpoint is unauthenticated.

projectSettings.title: Project settings
projectSettings.subtitle: Edit the project configuration or remove the project entirely.
projectSettings.editDescription: Update the project's database, backend, and frontend server configuration.
projectSettings.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting a project also removes its task history. This cannot be undone.
projectSettings.deleteDescription: Delete project {name}? This action cannot be undone.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and active sessions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your account identity within Admin Panel.

security.title: Password
security.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeDescription: Sign out this device immediately. The user will need to sign in again.
sessions.emptyDescription: There are no other devices signed in to your account.

servers.title: Servers
servers.subtitle: Manage SSH-accessible servers used by projects.
servers.empty: Add a server to start registering projects.
servers.deleteDescription: Delete server {name} ({host})? Servers in use by projects cannot be deleted.
servers.bulkDeleteTitle: Delete {count, plural, one {# server} other {# servers}}?
servers.bulkDeleteDescription: This permanently deletes the selected servers. Servers in use by a project will be skipped.
servers.bulkDeletedSuccess: {count, plural, one {# server} other {# servers}} deleted

serverForm.name: Name
serverForm.usageEmptyDescription: No project is currently using this server.

newServer.title: Add server
newServer.description: Register a new server's SSH credentials. Servers can be reused across multiple projects.
newServer.formDescription: Provide host, username, and password. Use Test connection to verify before saving.

editServer.title: Edit server: {name}
editServer.description: Update SSH credentials and review where this server is used.
editServer.formDescription: Leave the password blank to keep it unchanged.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in with your @example.com work email

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link if the account exists.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If your email is registered, a password reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Create a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully, please sign in

acceptInvite.title: Activate account
acceptInvite.description: Set a password for the account {email}
acceptInvite.invalidDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
acceptInvite.name: Name

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Enter your current and new password.
changePassword.revokeOtherSessions: Sign me out of all other devices

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Manage panel users and pending invitations.
users.pendingDescription: Invitations that have not been activated.
users.bulkDeleteTitle: Delete {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}?
users.bulkDeleteDescription: This permanently deletes the selected users. Your own account is always excluded.
users.bulkDeletedSuccess: {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}} deleted
users.bulkDeletedNothing: Nothing to delete — your own account was excluded.
users.bulkRevokeTitle: Revoke {count, plural, one {# invitation} other {# invitations}}?
users.bulkRevokeDescription: Selected invitations will be deleted and the links will stop working.
users.bulkRevokedSuccess: {count, plural, one {# invitation} other {# invitations}} revoked

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.description: Create the first admin account for Admin Panel. This page only appears when no users exist yet.
setup.name: Name

actionErrors.emailSendFailed: Failed to send invitation email, check RESEND_API_KEY configuration
actionErrors.invitationInvalid: Invitation is invalid or has expired
actionErrors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters
actionErrors.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most {max} characters
actionErrors.setupAlreadyDone: Initial setup has already been completed
actionErrors.serverInUse: Cannot delete server while still in use by a project
actionErrors.passwordRequiredForTest: Enter the password to test the connection
